basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for MTS, Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Research Officer/Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website puchd.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the PU Research Officer/Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts. Relaxation for SC/ST/Others as per GoI guidelines.

qualification.details: Research Officer/Assistant: Post-Graduate from a UGC-recognized University (LLM/Post Graduation preferred). Preference: IPR course qualified, MS Office knowledge, excellent communication & writing skills, minimum 55% in UG/PG (relaxation for SC/ST/Others as per GoI). Secretarial Assistance/Multi-Task Staff/Worker: 10+2 class. Preference: Writing in English, Punjabi, Hindi; familiar with academic office.

selection_process: Merit List Preparation based on Academic Qualifications
Communication Skills (out of 50 marks) Interview for Top 8 Candidates (IPR Knowledge
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Panjab University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the Panjab University Research Officer/Assistant posts is 13 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Officer/Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by Panjab University for the Research Officer/Assistant and Secretarial Assistance/Multi-Task Staff/Worker positions combined.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Officer/Assistant role?
faq.answer: For the Research Officer/Assistant position, candidates need to be Post-Graduates from a UGC-recognized University, with LLM or Post Graduation being preferred. A minimum of 55% in UG/PG is generally required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/Others as per Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 15,000/- to Rs. 57,000/- per month, depending on the post and their qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the preparation of a merit list based on academic qualifications, experience, and skills, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for Panjab University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Panjab University?
faq.answer: The official website of Panjab University is where candidates can find more information and download the application form. The link is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific preferences for the Research Officer/Assistant role?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have completed an IPR course, possess MS Office knowledge, have excellent communication and writing skills.
